delta_since_1300.summary: Quiet tick #2. State frozen from 12:30 across two consecutive 30-min windows. No trigger conditions advanced or fired.

findings: QUIET TICK #2: zero trades in the 13:00 → 13:30 window. Strategy has been silent for ~77 minutes since the COALINDIA BUY at 12:13:31. State is bit-identical to the 12:30 and 13:00 snapshots: holdings, cash, OPEN orders, sector exposures, and realized P&L unchanged.

DAY-STALE OPEN ORDERS PERSIST AND DEEPEN: TATAPOWER (27h17m), HINDZINC (26h47m), PHARMABEES (25h15m) — all 3 carryover orders advanced another 30 min without fill, cancel, or reprice. Now 77 min into a clean cancel/reprice window the strategy has elected silence. This remains a soft order-hygiene drag, not a risk-elevation trigger; appropriate concern of the strategy layer (system_prompt rule 8 / order hygiene). Carry-forward Trigger (f) from 13:00 still arms for 14:30 escalation.
Realized P&L today: -₹5,964.24 (-0.60% of capital). Buffer to 3% daily loss gate ₹23,903.54 (4.0x); buffer to -1% findings threshold ₹3,991.69 (1.67x). Unchanged from 12:30 and 13:00.
Deployment at cost: 44.84% — 20.16 pp inside the 0.65 max_deployed_pct cap. Projected on full carryover fill: 57.91% — 7.09 pp inside cap. Admission window remains comfortably open.

Sector concentration broad: FMCG 12.06%, Power 9.91%, BFSI 7.91%, Pharma 5.22%, Gold-ETF 5.03%, Mining/Coal 4.71%. Six distinct sectors. Largest single sector (FMCG) sits 9.94 pp inside cap. On full carryover fill: Power 14.81%, still 7.19 pp inside cap. No sector approaches the 22% cap.

PSU/utility-energy thematic exposure at cost remains at 14.62% (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA). On full TATAPOWER fill: 19.52% with 2.48 pp buffer to the 22% sector cap. No new admissions in this thematic since 12:30 — Trigger (a) NOT FIRED.
Position sizing: NESTLEIND remains largest at 12.06% (2.94 pp buffer to 0.15 cap). Other 6 names range 4.71% to 7.91%. No single name approaches per-name cap.

All 7 risk overrides remain materially tighter than base config and binding-but-not-breached. Post-rotation portfolio profile holds: deployment well inside cap, broad sector diversification, no single-name dominance, modest realized loss inside buffer, strategy demonstrating SELL-before-BUY discipline earlier in the session.

Disciplined call: NO override change. None of the 13:00 carry-forward spec-hard triggers (a)-(g) have fired in the 13:00 → 13:30 window. A second consecutive quiet tick with no state change cannot motivate a state change in the override file. Tightening on a quiet tick would be theatrical and would punish exactly the disciplined-pause behavior the framework wants to reward.

Risk level LOW (unchanged). Composite distress meta-trigger dormant: realized P&L well inside 3% gate, no single-name distress, strategy silence (77 min) within normal pacing — the Day-2 'extended silence' regime was 24h+, this is well below. Carry-forward triggers re-armed unchanged for 14:00 tick: (a) if strategy admits a 2ND new BUY in PSU/utility-energy thematic by 14:00, OR thematic exposure crosses 22% on full fill — fire min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67 AND consider max_sector_pct 0.22 → 0.20 (latter creates grandfathered breach on Power on full fill — step carefully); (b) if a NEW BUY lands in BFSI specifically — fire min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67; (c) if MAHABANK / TORNTPOWER / HINDUNILVR are re-bought (already-recycled names within 24h) — fire min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67 AND log explicit cluster-recycle flag; (d) if realized loss extends past -1% (₹9,956 — additional ₹3,992 needed) — fire daily_loss_limit_pct 0.03 → 0.025; (e) if TATAPOWER fills AND a 2nd new BUY lands the same window — fire max_deployed_pct 0.65 → 0.62 to re-tighten admission cadence; (f) if all 3 day-stale OPEN orders remain OPEN at 14:30 with no cancel/reprice activity AND zero further strategy trades through 14:30, escalate order-hygiene observability into a system_prompt feedback note (not a numeric lever); (g) if strategy resumes BUYing AT THE SAME CADENCE as Day-1/Day-4 (≥3 BUYs within a 60-minute window) — fire max_deployed_pct 0.65 → 0.62 AND min_confidence 0.65 → 0.67; (h) NEW: if strategy silence extends past 3 hours (i.e., still no trade by 15:13) WITH any one of the 3 OPEN orders crossing 28h-stale — escalate to soft observability log of compounded behavioral drag (not a numeric lever — silence + stale orders is a strategy-layer concern).
